calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Kaller appeared in person for and with Miriam Butrimovitz and Regina Safdie via zoom (Petitioners).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Garrick's health, that she started to forget things and her health was declining 6 months before her passing, and that Mr. Kaller was the original attorney that helped draft the will for Ms. Garrick. The matter is taken under submission.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated June 10, 2010 is admitted to probate. Miriam Butrimovitz and Regina Safdie are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 2, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Aug-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
